description:
**Job Description**
 GSS OTS Lead Engineer
   

  

**Business** 
**Group:** 
 GSS HUB
   

  

**Primary** 
**Work** 
**Location:** 
 EEEC, Pune
   

  

**Job Summary:**
 Simulation is an integral part of the Guardian Software and Solutions Hub at Emerson. The Lead Engineer role requires strong customer focus, sound judgment, effective communication skills, team management capabilities, and quick learning abilities. The candidate must also be capable of driving projects processes through close communication and coordination.
   

  

**InthisRole,YourResponsibilitiesWill Be:** 
**Who You Are:**
* Project Execution
* Administer, generate technical queries and obtain necessary clarifications from the customer.
* Perform the detailed design and configuration of the dynamic simulation solution.
* Manage technical interfaces with the customer and other external stakeholders as required.
* Coordinate and manage technical interfaces with subcontractors when applicable.
* Prepare, review, and ensure the quality of project related design documents and software deliverables.
* Serve as the technical liaison between internal sub teams, disciplines, and integrated systems.
* Plan, coordinate, and execute acceptance testing activities, ensuring smooth system handover.
* Prepare for, participate in, and lead technical discussions during project meetings.
* Develop and define project standards, guidelines, and best practices.
* Lead the creation of technical deliverables and associated test procedures.
* Update and maintain the status of all technical deliverables throughout the project lifecycle.
* Lead development and testing of plant dynamic simulation models and internal control layers according to project specifications.
* Support identification of project risks and contribute to defining appropriate mitigation plans.
* Data Collection and Documentation
* Collect, analyze and document project related data from customers.
* Support preparation of necessary project documentation.
* Prepare Efforts estimates and project schedules
* Planning \\& Team Collaboration
* Plan, allocate, and monitor tasks necessary for successful project execution.
* Provide weekly updates on progress, status, and issues to the PM/supervisor.
* Train and mentor new engineers and conduct team knowledge ‑ sharing sessions.
* Flexibly perform any project activity as instructed by the PM/supervisor.
* Continuous Improvement
* Review and enhance processes and productivity tools based on project objectives, specifications, and feedback.
* Create improvement requests and review proposed changes.
* Contribute to improvement initiatives at CoE Pune and lead organizational initiatives/projects as assigned.
* Quality Control \\& Assurance
* Implementation of CoE quality processes/documentation throughout the project.
* Adopts to World Area quality requirements and Customer’s regulatory guidelines.
* Practices and promotes First time right approach.
* Strictly follows GDP (Good Documentation Practices).
* Promote continuous improvement in deliverables and workflow quality.
* Maintain accuracy, correctness, and consistency in documentation and project execution.
* Other Duties
* Perform other additional specific duties, when requested by the business. These will, typically, be strategic in nature but could potentially be anything that the post holder is suitably qualified and experienced to undertake. These duties may be assigned to the person under guidance of a supervisor.


 You are an initiative\\-taking, hands\\-on professional with strong energy and a commitment to integrity. You demonstrate effective communication, collaboration, and leadership. You are eager to learn, develop your skills continuously, and guide team members. You adapt well to global time zones and excel in customer\\-facing and collaborative environments.
   

  

**Technical Competencies**
* Ability to read and interpret P\\&IDs, PFDs, equipment datasheets, and other technical documents.
* Strong experience with simulation tools such as DeltaV Mimic, Aspen HYSYS Dynamics and Aspen Dynamics.
* Experience in OTS configuration, delivery, operations, and commissioning.
* Experience leading simulation projects in Oil \\& Gas, Refinery, Petrochemicals, Metals \\& Minerals, LNG.
* Experience in leading Kick\\-Off Meeting, Acceptance Tests (MAT/MVT, FAT, SAT) and Trainings
* Ability to lead multiple simulation projects in parallel.
* Experience integrating process models with control and safety systems.
* Proficiency with MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint.


**PreferredQualificationsthatSetYou Apart:**
* BE / B. Tech Degree in Chemical or Petrochemical Engineering from a reputed institute.
* Experience of 8\\-12 years in Dynamic Process Simulation.
* Experience in Process Plant Operations will be an added advantage.
* Strong interpersonal skills and customer relationship capabilities.
* Ability to manage teams or groups and organize workforce effectively.
* Motivation to learn and work with cutting\\-edge technologies.
* Willingness to adjust working hours for global collaboration.


**OurOfferto You:**

 to meet the needs of our employees.

**equity**

**Sponsorship** 
 .

 Safety is paramount to us, and we are relentless in our pursuit of providing a

 across our global network and facilities.
   

  

 Through our benefits, development opportunities, and an inclusive and safe work environment, we aim to create an organization our people are proud to represent.
   

  

**OurCommitmenttoDiversity,Equity\\& Inclusion**
 At Emerson, we are committed to fostering a culture where every employee is valued and respectedfortheiruniqueexperiencesandperspectives.Webelieveadiverseandinclusivework environment contributes to the rich exchange of ideas and diversity of thoughts, that inspires innovation and brings the best solutions to our customers.

**WHY** 
**EMERSON**
**OurCommitmenttoOur People**
 At Emerson, we are motivated by a spirit of collaboration that helps our diverse, multicultural teamsacrosstheworlddriveinnovationthatmakestheworldhealthier,safer,smarter,andmore sustainable. And we want you to join us in our bold aspiration.
   

  

 We have built an engaged community of inquisitive, dedicated people who thrive knowing they arewelcomed,trusted,celebrated,andempoweredtosolvetheworld’smostcomplexproblems
   

  

 — for our customers, our communities, and the planet. You’ll contribute to this vital work while further developing your skills through our award\\-winning employee development programs. We are a proud corporate citizen in every city where we operate and are committed to our people, our communities, and the world at large.We takethis responsibility seriously and strive to make a positive impact through every endeavor.
   

  

 At Emerson, you’ll see firsthand that our people are at the center of everything we do. So, let’s go. Let’s think differently. Learn, collaborate, and grow. Seek opportunity. Push boundaries. Be empowered to make things better. Speed up to break through. Let’s go together.
   

  

**About Emerson**

description:

 At AMD, our mission is to build great products that accelerate next\\-generation computing experiences—from AI and data centers, to PCs, gaming and embedded systems. Join us as we shape the future of AI and beyond.

**Principal Validation Engineer – Platform/Firmware**
**THE ROLE**
 We are seeking an experienced System Software Design Engineer with deep expertise in operating systems internals, Linux distributions, and datacenter infrastructure. The ideal candidate combines hands\\-on proficiency in C/C\\+\\+/Python development with extensive experience in test framework design, server validation, and datacenter operations. In this role, you will design robust test strategies, build comprehensive test plans, develop automation solutions, and collaborate closely with development teams to ensure the delivery of high\\-quality software.
   

  

**THE PERSON**
 The ideal candidate is passionate about software engineering and possesses the leadership skills to drive complex issues to resolution. Your curiosity will fuel continuous learning and innovation, helping improve how we work as a team and organization. You will join a results\\-oriented, collaborative environment that fosters career growth and technical excellence.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Test Strategy \\& Execution**
* Design, develop, and execute comprehensive test plans, strategies, and test cases for complex system\\-level features
* Perform functional, integration, and system\\-level testing across multiple Linux distributions (Ubuntu, RHEL, SLES) and Windows
* Ensure thorough test coverage for GPU product features
* Review requirements and create traceable test cases


**Debugging \\& Analysis**
* Analyze and debug issues across the full software stack leveraging deep knowledge of Linux internals, system services, kernel behavior, performance tools, and logs
* Investigate failures, perform root cause analysis, and provide detailed debug information to development teams


**Automation \\& Development**
* Develop and maintain automated tests using gtest, ctest, and other relevant test frameworks
* Write clean, maintainable C/C\\+\\+ and Python code for test automation, validation tools, and testing infrastructure


**Collaboration \\& Leadership**
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to ensure testability and influence design decisions that improve product quality
* Mentor junior engineers and contribute to building a high\\-quality engineering culture
* Independently drive tasks to completion as a self\\-starter


**Experience**
**REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS**
* 8\\+ years of industry experience in software development, testing, validation, or system bring\\-up
* Product development or systems engineering background with hardware platforms and their software/firmware ecosystems


**Technical Expertise**
* Strong understanding of Linux internals: system architecture, boot flow, processes, memory management, networking, and kernel fundamentals
* Hands\\-on experience with multiple Linux distributions and package/configuration management
* Proficiency in C/C\\+\\+ and Python/Shell scripting
* Expert\\-level debugging skills using tools such as gdb, valgrind, strace, and perf
* Strong knowledge of GPU, CPU, SoC, or computer system architecture


**Testing \\& Validation**
* Good hands\\-on experience with test frameworks such as gtest, ctest, or similar
* Solid understanding of software testing processes, SDLC, and best practices
* Ability to design effective test plans and test cases for complex software components


**Soft Skills**
* Strong analytical and problem\\-solving skills
* Excellent communication and collaboration abilities


**Preferred Qualifications**
**Server and Data Center Knowledge**
* Proven experience in datacenter operations and server validation, including hardware and software qualification
* Strong understanding of server and datacenter architecture
* Hands\\-on exposure to hyperscale and enterprise server environments (network, storage, data processing, out\\-of\\-band/in\\-band management, monitoring solutions)


**Specialized Knowledge**
* AI/ML concepts and applications
* Deep learning, high\\-performance computing, or GPU server\\-based computing
* CUDA GPU computing languages
* Parallel computing with MPI programming experience


**Tools \\& Technologies**
* CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI)
* Container technologies (Docker, Podman, Kubernetes)
* Cloud, virtualization, and container environments
* System\\-level, functional, and environmental stress testing
* Performance testing for hardware\\-software systems


**Leadership**
* Excellent interpersonal, organizational, and technical leadership skills


**ACADEMIC CREDENTIALS**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Engineering, Electronics / Electrical Engineering

title: NetCool Solution Architect
description:
**Join our Team**
**About This Opportunity**
 We are looking for a NetCool Solution Architect / Senior Solution Integrator to join the BCSS (BA Cloud Software and Services) team. This senior technical role will lead NetCool integration and automation efforts across multi\\-vendor, multi\\-technology environments. You will operate in an international setting, collaborating with customers, suppliers and internal stakeholders to design, build, and deliver robust event and fault management solutions based on the IBM Netcool suite and modern DevOps platforms.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Lead design and delivery of Netcool\\-based solutions (OMNIbus/ObjectServer, Impact, DASH/WebGUI, TBSM, ITNM, NOI) for multi\\-vendor, multi\\-customer environments.
* Define software modules and produce integration builds; configure, deploy and maintain probes, gateways, ObjectServer automations, impact policies, and operator views.
* Integrate and validate probes and data sources (SNMP, Syslog, Message Bus, JDBC, CORBA) and vendor\\-specific probes (Cobra, Nokia NetAct, ZTE, HP\\-NNM, Huawei, etc.).
* Troubleshoot complex issues across Unix/Linux platforms and database backends (DB2, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL).
* Implement CI/CD and DevOps practices using Jenkins, Docker, Kubernetes and Ansible; create Ansible playbooks and automation for repeatable deployments.
* Execute integration and system tests, document builds and test results, and ensure production readiness.
* Act as technical lead on projects: mentor junior engineers, coordinate with stakeholders, and handle customer and bridge communications.


**You will bring**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering (IT, Telecom) or equivalent experience; strong English communication skills.
* 5–10\\+ years’ hands\\-on experience with IBM Netcool suite and multi\\-vendor integrations.
* Deep knowledge of Netcool components (ObjectServer, probes, Impact, DASH/WebGUI) and building ObjectServer automations and Impact policies.
* Strong networking and protocol knowledge (TCP/IP, SNMP, EIF, Syslog) and proven Unix/Linux troubleshooting skills.
* Scripting and programming skills (Perl/Shell, Python; Java knowledge a plus).
* Experience with databases (DB2, Oracle, MySQL, PostgreSQL) and working with probes and message buses.
* Practical experience with DevOps tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins, Ansible and microservices architectures.
* Key soft skills: effective communication, stakeholder management, analytical problem solving, customer/bridge handling and the ability to work independently and mentor others.


**Why join Ericsson?** 
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?** 
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

**Senior Technical Engineer\\- System PnP**
  

  

**Senior System Power \\& Performance Engineer (MTS/SMTS Level)**
**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a highly motivated
 **System Power \\& Performance Engineer** 
 to join our
 **System PnP team** 
 . This role will have a
 **dual focus** 
 :
   

  

* Profiling and bottleneck analysis on AMD’s system PnP stack, with emphasis on Linux and virtualized environments.
* Driving competitive benchmarking across market segments, comparing AMD SoCs against competition.


 The ideal candidate will combine strong technical depth in
 **system performance analysis** 
 with a passion for competitive evaluation, ensuring AMD delivers industry\\-leading performance and power efficiency.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**System Power \\& Performance / PnP**
* Execute system performance profiling and bottleneck analysis on AMD’s SoCs, focusing on Linux (Ubuntu, Yocto) and virtualized software stacks for Robotics, automotive and industrial.
* Perform benchmark characterization, system\\-level tuning, micro architecture and workload analysis across CPU, GPU, NPU, AI and memory subsystems.
* Drive competitive benchmarking initiatives by running workloads on competitive platforms (Intel, Qualcomm, ARM\\-based SoCs) and building comparative landscapes across segments (client, embedded, industrial, automotive).
* Collaborate with SoC architects, BIOS/FW teams, and software developers to identify performance gaps and recommend optimizations.
* Generate comprehensive technical reports, dashboards, and documentation for leadership reviews, customer engagements, and outbound collateral.
* Contribute to automation for benchmark execution, data collection, and results visualization.
* Work with cross\\-functional teams to debug system\\-level issues blocking performance goals.


**Competitive Benchmarking**
* Run competitive benchmarking across Intel, ARM, Qualcomm, and other platforms.
* Build comparative performance landscapes across segments including client, embedded, server, industrial, and automotive.
* Provide actionable insights that help influence future SoC, firmware, and platform design.


**Automation, Reporting \\& Documentation**
* Support development of automation for benchmark execution, data collection, and results visualization.
* Generate technical reports, dashboards, and documentation for leadership and customer engagements.
* Foster continuous improvement and innovation within validation and performance analysis environments.


**Required Skills \\& Experience**
- 10\\+ years of relevant experience in system performance engineering, profiling, bottleneck analysis.

- Strong hands\\-on experience with Linux system performance analysis; exposure to Android and virtualized stacks is a plus.

- Experience with ROS2 framework, Robotics algorithms and components:

* Perception pipelines (SLAM, visual‑odometry, sensor fusion)
* Planning \\& control loops
* Kinematics, dynamics, and real\\-time constraints
* Middleware communication patterns: pipes, shared memory, zero‑copy
* Expert in Linux internals (scheduling, memory management), Real Time systems(RT kernel, interrupt and jitter), QoS Tuning.
* Hands on in performance profiling tools: perf, valgrind, LTTng, perfetto, Trace Compass, wireshark, Nsight, Vtune, Oprofile, Flameghraphs, GPU PerfStudio etc
* Strong understanding of x86 SoC architecture, CPU/GPU/NPU performance, memory hierarchy, PCIe, BIOS/FW interactions, and system\\-level behavior.
* Experience with industry benchmarking suites such as SPEC, 3DMark, PCMark, GFXBench, MLPerf, MobileMark, browser benchmarks, and multimedia workloads.
* Proficiency in Python/Bash/C/C\\+\\+/Perl for automation, data processing, and reporting.
* Strong knowledge of embedded OSes and hypervisors (Linux, Windows Server, VMware, KVM, etc.).
* Ability to manage multiple concurrent projects in fast\\-paced environments.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills with experience producing clear, data\\-driven reports.
* Proven cross\\-team collaboration skills and ability to drive complex debug efforts.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with virtualization technologies (Xen, KVM, Hyper\\-V, container environments).
* Exposure to post\\-silicon bring\\-up, system validation flows, and early silicon testing.
* Experience with competitive benchmarking methodologies and customer\\-facing documentation.
* Debug expertise at system level and SoC level.


**Education**
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field.
